analysis.reasoning: Core message: Expresses solidarity with Indigenous peoples worldwide on International Day, noting their vulnerability during the COVID-19 pandemic. There is no explicit mention of the European Union, its policies, unity, leadership, or global actions. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU successful story) – not referenced. EU2 (EU united) – no mention of EU unity or agreements. EU3 (EU useful for citizens) – not about EU policies within the EU. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – no claim of EU pioneering action. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – while the tweet expresses solidarity with a human-rights-related group, it does not attribute leadership or action to the EU. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – no indication that the EU is contributing; the tweet is a general statement. Conclusion: No listed EU narrative is promoted.
